name: HaGeZi Light
description: Curated list blocking ads, tracking and metrics. Low false positives. ~140K domains.

name: OISD Small
description: Block. Don't break. Minimal false positives, updated hourly. ~57K domains.

name: Steven Black Unified
description: The classic merged hosts file from multiple curated sources. ~170K domains.

name: AdGuard DNS Filter
